name: Peak Design Travel Wash Pouch 1L
description: The Travel Wash Pouch from Peak Design has a 1L capacity to organize your essential toiletries.

features.Key Features:: Thoughtfully-Designed Toiletry Bag | Small for Lightweight Packing | Exterior Grab Handle | Zippered Interior Pouch | Network of Mesh Interior Pockets | Magnetically-Sealed Toothbrush Pocket | Exterior Razor Pocket | Sits Upright on Flat Surfaces | Stowable Aluminum Hook for Hanging | Water-Repellant Recycled Nylon Shell
features.What’s in the box?: Peak Design Travel Wash Pouch | Limited Lifetime Warranty
